spikes.label: Midday Stock Movements
spikes.rag_answer: Midday stock movements have shown significant volatility, with various companies experiencing notable fluctuations in their stock prices. Key players such as Paramount Skydance, Apple, and UnitedHealth have been highlighted for making the largest moves during these trading sessions. This volatility is occurring against a backdrop of broader market concerns, including geopolitical tensions, economic slowdowns, and changing investor sentiment. As a result, investors are advised to be selective and cautious in their trading strategies during this period of uncertainty.

rag_sources.title: European markets close higher as investors digest key points from Munich Security Conference
rag_sources.snippet: 2026-02-16: European markets close higher as investors digest key points from Munich Security Conference: Stock markets in Europe began the week in positive territory after edging lower on Friday.
